name: Mikoto Aiura
description:
__ Height:__  166 cm

Aiura is a gyaru soothsayer, or someone who is able to foresee the future. She is another love-interest of Kusuo's and transfers to PK Academy upon reading her own fortune and learning that her "Mr. Right" would be there. After witnessing him save Yumehara Chiyo from a possibly deadly fall, she deduces that Kusuo is the one she's been looking for. Also as a result, she becomes one of the few people outside of his family that knows of his powers.
